$schema_note: Phase 5 M4 consistency-hints golden set. Each case posts a draft with include_consistency_hints=true and asserts the expected drift kind appears in insights.

cases.name: verse_to_chorus_perspective_flip
cases.content:
[verse]
I walk alone tonight
I hold my dreams in sight
I never let them go
I keep them safe and slow

[chorus]
You take your time and shine
You give your heart for mine
You call across the night
You make the morning right
cases.notes: First-person verse flips to second-person chorus.

cases.name: past_to_present_tense_flip
cases.content:
[verse]
She walked alone tonight
She whispered to the light
She waited by the door
She wanted something more

[chorus]
I am walking by her side
She is laughing in the rain
We are standing in the light
I am holding her again
cases.notes: Past-tense verse against present-progressive chorus (-ing + is/am/are).
